nasb.text: The sons of Gad and the sons of Reuben answered, saying, “As the Lord has said to your servants, so we will do.

esv.text: And the people of Gad and the people of Reuben answered, “What the Lord has said to your servants, we will do.

cnv.text: 迦得的子孫和流本的子孫回答，說：“耶和華怎樣吩咐僕人，我們就怎樣行。

ccb.text: 迦得和吕便的子孙再次说：“凡耶和华所吩咐的，仆人们一定照办。
